content.en:
"Glass Realm Dragon, what is this?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of the Moon Realm introduced: "The Glass Realm Dragon is the mortal enemy of the Tooth Realm Worm, and it feeds on the Tooth Realm Worm, and the Tooth Realm Worm of the same rank can't defeat the Glass Realm Dragon at all. However, the glazed realm dragon is very rare, but it is also really powerful, and it is enough to rival the transcendent realm master of the first realm when it is born, and it can reach the third realm when it is an adult. "

"Can you reach the third realm when you become an adult?"

Ye Tian was shocked, and this kind of extra-dimensional creature is too powerful!

The Lord of the Moon Realm said again: "However, the growth period of the Glass Realm Dragon is very slow, and if there is no chance, it will take hundreds of thousands of extradimensional epochs to reach adulthood. Of course, this is also faster than many of the extradimensional realms of the second realm. The point is that the second realm, which is more than ninety out of ten, will never be able to become the third realm. Therefore, we are also very envious of the Glazed Realm Dragon! The wisp of Glazed Realm Dragon breath sealed by the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce should belong to the Glazed Realm Dragon of the Fourth Realm, so those Tooth Realm Worms will be scared away. "

"The Tooth Realm Worm is nothing, it's just a large number, if it weren't for the fact that there is no benefit in destroying the Tooth Realm Worm, many big forces will join forces to destroy the Tooth Realm Worm Clan. "

While Ye Tian was chatting with the Lord of the Moon Realm, the Nine Colored Treasure Ship of the Nine Colored Chamber of Commerce continued to move forward, and the many extra-dimensional realms that took the Nine Colored Treasure Boat were also relieved.

Just now, they were really worried that they would fall here, but fortunately, they were safe in the end.

At this time, they were also glad that they took the flight of the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce, and if they took some wild flights, they would definitely be killed.

It didn't take long.

The Nine Colored Treasure Ship arrived at the 5,333 Extradimensional Territory, and Ye Tian came down at one of the stations in this Extradimensional Territory.

......

Jellyfish world.

This is one of the many extradimensional realms in the territory of 5333, and it is also one of the more important extradimensional realms, otherwise it would not have been selected as one of the flight stops.

After Ye Tian came to this extradimensional realm, he asked the Lord of the Moon Realm about the situation here.

"The most powerful force in the jellyfish world is the Dongyang Palace, the Dongyang Hall only has a third realm in the jellyfish world, but there is a fourth realm existence behind it, which was also cultivated by the Dongyang Palace, and now it is in the territory of the fifth thousand. Therefore, Dongyang Hall is a force that we cannot offend, otherwise it will not be good to usher in the fourth realm!"

The Moon Realm Lord reminded.

"Shangyue Realm Lord, you said before that there is a place in the Five Thousand Three Hundred and Thirty-Three Territory that can assist me in comprehending the extradimensional rules, where is it?" Ye Tian finally couldn't help but ask.

"Black Mist Realm!" the Moon Realm Lord said, "This extra-dimensional realm is a very special extra-dimensional realm, not suitable for any living beings to survive, even the second realm is difficult to stay there for a long time. However, there are many opportunities in this extradimensional realm, and one of them is suitable for contemplating the extradimensional rules. "

"In this case, not many extradimensional realms will enter there, and those great powers will allow such treasures to be used by other extradimensional realms, why not occupy there?"

Ye Tian expressed his doubts.

If the human race finds such a place, it will definitely occupy it, surround and seal the entire extradimensional realm, and do not allow other extradimensional realms to enter.

And the Lord of the Moon Realm said the reason: "It's not that there are no forces that want to occupy the Black Mist Realm, but they don't dare to occupy it. First of all, the Black Mist Realm, this special extra-dimensional realm, is very peculiar, it is not immobile all the time, but a movable extra-dimensional realm, even if the powerful extra-dimensional formation is used to block the Black Mist Realm, it will still be broken by the Black Mist Realm. An extradimensional realm that is always moving, naturally cannot be occupied. "

"In addition, the place where you can assist the extradimensional realm to comprehend the extradimensional rules is not so easy to enter. If it's so easy to get into, all the second realms will come!"

"The place in the Black Mist Realm that can assist in comprehending the extradimensional rules is very terrifying, and you must use an item to enter it, otherwise even if it is the third realm, it will be corrupted and die. Of course, the Third Realm could not enter the Black Mist Realm, and the Black Mist Realm rejected the existence of the Third Realm. "

Hearing that the third realm couldn't enter the Black Mist Realm, Ye Tian frowned a little, and asked, "So, you can't enter the Black Mist Realm either?"

"No, I can go in!" The Lord of the Moon Realm smiled bitterly: "The standard of the third realm is the extra-dimensional realm in my body, the extra-dimensional realm in my body has been broken and dissipated, and my cultivation has fallen back to the second realm, so I can naturally enter." "

"Do you have anything to get into that place?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Next, Ye Tian inquired about where the Black Mist Realm was now, because it had been moving, and the information in the past was naturally useless, even the Moon Realm Lord could not know the current location of the Black Mist Realm.

Soon, Ye Tian found out.

...... []

Death Void.

An incomparably large phantom is constantly moving, and this phantom is the Black Mist Realm.

From time to time, a second realm extradimensional realm rushed into the black mist realm, and there were also extradimensional realms coming out of it.

At this time, Ye Tian followed a relatively safe route and finally arrived here.

"Finally arrived at this Black Mist Realm!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief, this journey was not peaceful, he was attacked and killed by many extradimensional creatures, fortunately he did not encounter the superdimensional creatures of the third realm, otherwise he would not have been able to arrive here safely.

Immediately, he also rushed into the Black Mist Realm.

As soon as he entered the black mist realm, wisps of black mist surrounded him, but he was forcibly resisted by his extradimensional body and extradimensional rules, but after a long time, he couldn't hold on.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, follow the route I said, don't make a mistake, there are no native extradimensional creatures in the Black Mist Realm, but there are some dangers here, and no matter how powerful the Second Realm is, you won't be able to survive. The Moon Realm Lord reminded.

After all, once Ye Tian died, she would also die.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian responded and moved forward according to the instructions of the Lord of the Moon Realm.

After a while, he came to the location mentioned by the Lord of the Moon Realm, which was already covered by countless black mist, and the density of black mist was thousands of times that of other places, so it can be seen that if there was no black mist stone, once he entered here, he would naturally die.

"Urge the black mist stone, form a black mist stone coat, and enter it!"

The Lord of the Moon Realm shouted.
